name: grants
description: Per-resource dynamic access grants — 'Alice grants Bob edit on invoice #123 until Friday'. Overlays above RBAC (per D-A3 of the access-approvals spec): effective permission on a resource = RBAC ∪ grants − denies. Deny grants take priority over allow grants AND over RBAC roles — an explicit deny is inviolable and short-circuits every check. Grants are subject-polymorphic (usually User; Group deferred to Wave 2) and resource-polymorphic (Invoice / Athlete / Team / any domain aggregate that composes IsGrantable). The `permissions` column is a JSONB array of permission names scoped to that specific (resource_type, resource_id) tuple — no scope suffix needed because the resource is explicit. Time-bounded via `expires_at` (nullable = permanent; enterprise-gated). Revocable at any time — `revoked_at + revoked_by + revoked_reason` track the revocation trail. Every write audited via HasActivityLog + HasAudit. Consumed by the RBAC PermissionResolver at every check via GrantOverlayResolver: walks the (principal, resource_type, resource_id) tuple, short-circuits on any deny, returns allow, defers to RBAC otherwise. Ships the GrantIssuer central action that access/requests + workflow/approvals invoke to materialise approved access requests into grant rows (source='access_request', source_reference=approval_instance_id).

tenant.description: Tenant-facing grant CRUD. Owners + delegated grantors manage per-resource access grants for their tenant.

platform-admin.description: Platform-admin cross-tenant grant read + compliance snapshot generation. Read-only + audit-report only; platform staff never issue tenant-scope grants.
